notableEvents.label: Balk run(s)
notableEvents.detail: With Kyle Schwarber batting, Justin Crawford scores on a balk. Garrett Stubbs advances to 3rd on a balk. Trea Turner advances to 2nd on a balk.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Marsh lines out to third baseman Javier Sanoja. Garrett Stubbs scores. Trea Turner to 3rd. Bryce Harper to 2nd. Missed catch error by first baseman Kyle Stowers, assist to third baseman Javier Sanoja.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Alec Bohm.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Alec Bohm.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jakob Marsee reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Trea Turner.

notableEvents.label: Gabriel Rincones Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Rincones Jr. grounds into a double play, third baseman Javier Sanoja to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Bryson Stott out at 2nd. Gabriel Rincones Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Marsh lines out to third baseman Javier Sanoja. Garrett Stubbs scores. Trea Turner to 3rd. Bryce Harper to 2nd. Missed catch error by first baseman Kyle Stowers, assist to third baseman Javier Sanoja.

notableEvents.label: Javier Sanoja reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Alec Bohm.

notableEvents.label: Jakob Marsee reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jakob Marsee reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Trea Turner.
